section_miscategorizations.text: The patient is a 60-year-old right-handed male with fatigue, weight gain, excessive appetite, bloating, floaters, shortness of breath, leg swelling, nail bed changes, dryness, itching, gout, and muscle pain.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This sentence is a list of patient-reported symptoms and past medical issues rather than objective exam or test findings. It fits better as part of the symptom/history narrative in the HPI, though its placement in Findings is not severely misleading.
